title: ‘They will never be forgotten’: PM Modi pays tribute to Pahalgam victims
content: India marked the first anniversary of the horrific Pahalgam terror attack with Prime Minister Modi and the Army vowing unwavering resolve. The nation remembers the 26 innocent lives lost, with a strong message that terror will not succeed. India's decisive response, 'Operation Sindoor,' and subsequent 'Operation Mahadev' neutralized perpetrators, ensuring justice.

title: ‘Show my dad on camera, see his reactions’: Abhishek Sharma’s sweet request wins hearts
content: Abhishek Sharma's unbeaten 135 powered Sunrisers Hyderabad to a commanding IPL 2026 victory over Delhi Capitals.  Post-match, he emotionally dedicated his performance to his father, who has guided him since childhood. Sharma also highlighted the team's supportive environment and his desire to entertain the fans with his aggressive batting.

title: 'Trust & confidence reposed': Pak PM thanks Trump for ceasefire extension
content: Pakistan's Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif thanked US President Trump for extending the Iran conflict ceasefire, hoping for lasting peace.  Sharif expressed optimism for a 'Peace Deal' in upcoming Islamabad talks, emphasizing Pakistan's continued mediation.  Despite the truce extension, uncertainty lingers due to Iran's conditional engagement and the US naval blockade, though global leaders cautiously welcome the de-escalation.

title: Meta to install tracking software on American employee's machines: Here is what the memo said
content: Meta is installing new tracking software on US employees' computers to capture mouse movements, clicks, and keystrokes for AI training. This initiative aims to improve AI agents' ability to perform work tasks autonomously, like using shortcuts. Meta assures employees the data won't be used for performance reviews, only for enhancing AI models.

title: Amazon files lawsuit after losing millions in fake laptop and GPU refunds
content: A sophisticated refund scam has cost Amazon $4 million in stolen goods like graphics cards and laptops. A group named RBK allegedly exploited customer support by claiming packages never arrived, even using fake police reports. Amazon uncovered the scheme through an undercover investigator, leading to a lawsuit against named individuals and unknown accomplices.

title: 2 days after Tamil Nadu, 13 die in Kerala cracker unit blast
content: A devastating explosion at a fireworks unit in Thrissur, Kerala, claimed at least 13 lives and injured many, with five in critical condition. The blast, occurring during preparations for a festival, destroyed four sheds. Intense heat may have contributed to the tragedy, which follows a similar incident in Tamil Nadu. An inquiry has been ordered.

title: IPL 2026 Orange Cap race: Abhishek Sharma surges past Klaasen to claim top spot
content: Abhishek Sharma has surged to the top of the IPL 2026 Orange Cap race with an unbeaten 135, now leading with 323 runs. Teammate Heinrich Klaasen is close behind with 320 runs, while Shubman Gill, Virat Kohli, and Vaibhav Sooryavanshi complete the top five. The competition remains intense with several players in excellent form.

title: 'Never been more ...':Tim Cook in memo to employees on his exit as Apple CEO
content: Apple CEO Tim Cook announced his transition to executive chairman later this year, after a 15-year tenure. He expressed confidence in Apple's future and its core values, praising the team's dedication. John Ternus, SVP of hardware engineering, will succeed Cook as CEO, with Cook pledging to support the smooth transition.

title: MS Dhoni back at Wankhede! CSK legend drops massive return hint vs MI
content: MS Dhoni trained intensely for Chennai Super Kings. Will Jacks has arrived for Mumbai Indians. Both players are expected to feature in the Mumbai Indians versus Chennai Super Kings match. Australian pacer Spencer Johnson also joins the CSK squad. Injuries have impacted CSK's campaign. Ayush Mhatre is ruled out of IPL 2026.

title: IPL: Heinrich Klaasen creates history, joins Chris Gayle–Andre Russell elite club
content: Heinrich Klaasen continued his explosive run in IPL 2026, reaching a major milestone and joining an elite club alongside Chris Gayle and Andre Russell. The SRH star smashed a quickfire cameo against Delhi Capitals, capping a dominant batting display led by Abhishek Sharma’s stunning century.

title: Mike Vrabel divorce buzz grows as Jennifer stays silent amid Russini row
content: Mike Vrabel is facing growing scrutiny after his link-up with Dianna Russini sparked speculation about his marriage to Jennifer Vrabel. While no official statements confirm issues, commentators suggest possible personal consequences. The Patriots continue business as usual, and Russini has resigned, but public attention remains fixed on Vrabel’s personal life and rumored strain at home.

title: Dianna Russini’s troubles deepen amid Mike Vrabel affair claims
content: Mike Vrabel, the New England Patriots’ head coach, and the former New York Times’ NFL reporter, Dianna Russini, are still the talk of the town due to their alleged affair drama that sparked shockwaves across the league, a few days ago. While both have distanced themselves from the drama, it seems the scandal has now taken a turn for the worse.

title: London nightclub clash: Klaudia Zakrzewska hit by Gabrielle Carrington
content: Klaudia Zakrzewska, known as Klaudia Glam, is in critical condition after being hit by a car outside a London nightclub. Video shows a fight with Gabrielle Carrington before the crash. Carrington has been arrested, police confirmed. Two others were injured. Authorities are asking witnesses to come forward as the investigation continues.

title: 'Bhooth Bangla' box office day 5: Akshay's horror comedy surpasses Rs 117 crore globally
content: 'Bhooth Bangla', featuring the versatile Akshay Kumar, has delighted audiences worldwide, surpassing the Rs 100 crore milestone by earning Rs 117.71 crore. While the film has sparked split opinions among fans, it experienced a robust start that set the stage for its continuing success, particularly with a notable boost in Day 5 earnings. title: Abhishek’s century, Malinga's four-fer power SRH to third win on the trot
content: Abhishek Sharma’s explosive 135 off 68 balls powered Sunrisers Hyderabad to 242/2, with 10 sixes and 10 fours dominating DC’s bowling. Despite brief resistance, DC collapsed from 107/1 to 195/9 as Eshan Malinga’s 4/32 and Sakib Hussain’s strikes triggered a breakdown. SRH’s batting depth and disciplined bowling ensured a comfortable 47-run victory.

title: Rajpal Yadav on Rs 5 crore dues, says jail wasn’t for lack of money
content: Rajpal Yadav has opened up about one of the most talked-about phases of his life—his jail stint and the controversy surrounding the Rs 5 crore debt case. In a recent conversation, the actor addressed public perception, industry support, and the reality behind the headlines. One of the most common public perceptions—that an actor with such a vast filmography should have easily repaid Rs 5 crore—was also addressed.

title: ‘This is for you’ – Abhishek Sharma’s emotional tribute to sister after 135* vs DC
content: Abhishek Sharma smashed an unbeaten 135 to lead Sunrisers Hyderabad to a commanding 47-run win over Delhi Capitals. SRH posted a massive 242 for 2. Delhi faltered in their chase despite a strong start. Eshan Malinga and Sakib Hussain took crucial wickets. The win propelled SRH to third on the points table. Sharma's performance was a highlight of IPL 2026.

title: Lucas Erceg net worth 2026: From struggles to MLB success
content: Lucas Erceg's life story is one of overcoming challenges. He battled alcohol addiction and found strength through personal decisions. Now, Erceg is a key player for the Kansas City Royals. By 2026, he has become an essential relief pitcher, even stepping into the closer role. His career shows significant personal and professional growth.

title: IPL: Will DC make changes to XI after defeat to SRH? Axar clarifies
content: Sunrisers Hyderabad defeated Delhi Capitals by 47 runs, powered by Abhishek Sharma’s unbeaten 135 off 68 balls and Eshan Malinga’s 4/32. DC skipper Axar Patel stayed composed after the loss, saying no XI changes were needed and calling it an “off day.” He admitted missed chances but praised SRH, noting sometimes teams are simply outplayed.

title: After 80 yrs, Japan opens its weapons sector to world - what it means for India
content: Japan, shifting from its pacifist constitution, is now poised to export lethal weapons. This significant policy change, driven by regional security concerns, allows Tokyo to leverage its advanced defense technology. The move opens new avenues for its burgeoning defense industry, potentially transforming Japan into a major global arms supplier.

Kharge reportedly called Prime Minister Narendra Modi a 'terrorist'. The BJP deems this a violation of the Model Code of Conduct.

title: Limited economic impact? How Iran war is impacting job market and your household bills

While manufacturing faces some impact, the services sector remains robust, and overall growth for Q4 FY26 is projected to remain strong, with limited downside risks.

content: The accused planned to create a terror network aimed at establishing "Ghazwa-e-Hind" (conquest of India), wage war against the country using RDX explosives, target political leaders linked to RSS.

title: NBA draft top 100: Where top prospects land on the big board after March
content: yaxel Lendeborg wins a national championship with Michigan . AJ Dybantsa takes that mantle as the dust has settled on the season . the top of the draft remains open for discussion, with a group of talented players still jockeying for position in the lottery .

title: Draft rankings: Kiper finalizes his Big Board with top 150 prospects, best at every position
content: round 1 begins Thursday at 8 p.m. ET on ESPN, ABC and the ESPN App . scouting reports for the top 25 players, then list out Nos. 26-150 . I reserve right to make minor tweaks right up until the draft begins based on late-breaking reports .

title: 2026 NBA draft order: Where all 60 picks stand ahead of the lottery
content: Jeremy Woo previews his latest mock draft and looks at the biggest names to watch in the big 12 . the lottery, which will be held may 10, looms large for franchises trying to rebuild, as the 2026 class has been lauded as a historically deep pool of players .

title: Freddie, Chelsea Freeman announce birth of fourth child, first girl
content: Freddie Freeman and his wife Chelsea announced the birth of their fourth child, London Rosemary Joy . the couple had announced the expected arrival of the new child on twitter a month earlier . "the moment we've been waiting for," the post reads .

title: Why Guardiola's legacy could exceed the likes of Ferguson, Wenger, Klopp
content: arsenal face manchester city in the premier league on saturday . a major surgery has been required from Mikel Arteta to restore them as genuine contenders . it's clear that moving on from a manager who has been in position for a long time can be complicated .

title: What we learned at Notre Dame and Indiana this spring
content: the IU men's basketball team missed the ACC tournament for the third straight season . the team has advanced past the first round just once in a decade . there's a can't-miss, floor-to-ceiling advertisement for Indiana football .

title: Gadkari takes swipe at carmakers over CAFE-3 lobbying
content: road transport minister says they have been trying behind the scenes to influence policy and don’t get exposed like political leaders . he also indicated some parity in norms for flex-fuel hybrid cars with EVs . carmakers have also urged the government to allow carry over credit poi .

title: India, Korea plan 3rd phase of defence cooperation; eye collab in anti-aircraft guns, missile systems
content: the two sides have already co-manufactured the K9 Vajra, a specialised artillery gun, and now plan to extend the same manufacturing model to futuristic technologies . the two countries have agreed to broaden their defence partnership during the bilateral talks between PM Narendra Modi and south Korean president Lee Jae Myung .

title: West Asia conflict did ‘half the job’ in fuel shift push, says transport minister Gadkari
content: road transport minister urges automobile industry to go for 100% ethanol (E100) or Flex Fuel Vehicles (FFVs), adding that he no longer needs to persuade people to cut dependence on conventional fuels . the war has done half the job, and the rest is being driven by consumers experiencing the benefits of alternative fuels, he said .

title: Three Indian nationals under investigation over gurdwara double murder in Italy
content: two Indians handed themselves in to the Bergamo Provincial Command of the Carabinieri on the evening of April 18 . the two men were later released, but remain under investigation for complicity in the double homicide . they both live in Antegnate, where the main suspect lives .

title: Civil servants must be fearless, apolitical: Somanathan invokes Sardar Patel
content: cabinet secretary TV Somanathan invoked his vision of a politically neutral and integrity-driven group of civil servants . he also told officials to abide by the rules of conduct while suggesting that if they are asked to do anything that’s not as per rules, they should give “proper reasons” to senior executives .

title: Petition in Supreme Court flags ‘erasure’ of trans men in new law
content: petition in the Supreme Court challenging the transgender persons amendment act, 2026 . petition highlights the 'complete legislative erasure of trans men and trans masculine identities and other gender-diverse identities from the definition of transgeneous person' petition states the 2026 amendment law introduces sweeping changes to the 2019 law .

title: In Berlin, Rajnath beckons German industry to 'co-create, co-develop, co-innovate in India'
content: Rajnath Singh made a strong pitch for enhanced collaborations between defence industrial ecosystems of the two countries . he is set to hold talks with his german counterpart, Boris Pistorius, and other senior leaders .

title: Defence ministry inks Rs 975cr deals for key equipment for T-72, T-90 tanks
content: defence ministry signed contracts worth nearly Rs 975 crore for procurement of critical equipment for TRAWL assembly for T-72 and T-90 tanks . contracts with defence PSU Bharat Earth Movers Ltd (BEML) and Electro Pneumatics and Hydraulics (India) Private Ltd are for the procurement .

title: Sabarimala: Non-believer has no biz to challenge customs, says judge
content: a person who doesn't believe in a religion and its religious practices had no right to file petitions challenging their validity . a senior advocate argued that no devotee can act in derogation of practices attached to 'Naishtik Brahmachari' attributes of Lord Ayyappa .

title: Army rescues ailing woman from remote Jammu village on hills; carries her on stretcher for 3 hours
content: ailing woman evacuated from remote village of Chill at 7,500 feet . a villager came to the military operating base seeking urgent medical assistance . troops mobilised under challenging night conditions and reached their residence . evacuation involved traversing nearly 3km of rugged terrain marked by steep gradients .
